subcodes.first_line: O enraptured lover of the Abhá Beauty! What shall I write, as with a heart consumed and a countenance aglow, I stand in the school of servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای واله جمال ابهی چه نگارم که با دلی سوخته و رخی افروخته در دبستان عبودیت
subcodes.subjects: @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
